text:
"Teardrops of hope" is a song by Yoko Takahashi. 
It was featured in the soundtrack of the P Godzilla vs. Evangelion ~G Cell Awakening~ pachinko machine and in the Teardrops of hope digital single, it was released on 19 December 2022.

Lyrics

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center" width="100%"

!English
!Original
|-
| width="33%" | 

 
| width="33%" | 

 
| width="33%" | 
Holding my sorrows
Picking up drops of tears
I don't know where my homeland is
Can you feel my heart
I said goodbye to this world to my past to myself
A million words cannot alter my mind cos you'll leave me again
I turn away every time people look in my eyes
Cos I know they will break into my life
I found the girl I used to be
Just wanted to be loved
But now she is gone

Turning my sorrows
Into teardrops of hope
I can see where my homeland is
And it fills my heart
I said goodbye to this world to my past to myself
A million words will not alter my mind, you won't leave me again
I stand with you every time you look into my eyes
And I know you will bring joy to my life
I found the girl I used to be
Just wanted to be loved
But now she is gone

Catch me if you can
Hold my hand
Never let me go
Cut my wings
Keep me on the ground
Anchor my soul
I'll take your sins with your pain, with your blood, and your tears
The worst days are gone and I see the world differently
I say hello to our world, with my heart full of joy
I can see the girl waving at me smiled
